languages.original_text: "Unsettling words. Especially coming from someone with your... specialism."

languages.text: "Тревожные слова. Особенно от кого-то с твоей... специализацией".
"Unsettling words. Especially coming from someone with your... specialism."
languages.original_text: "Тревожные слова. Особенно от кого-то с твоей... специализацией".

traits.locale_text: "Unsettling words. Especially coming from someone with your... specialism."
"Unsettling words. Especially coming from someone with your... specialism."
"Unsettling words. Especially coming from someone with your... specialism."

languages.text: 「不安にさせるような言葉ですね。特に、あなたのような…専門分野を持つ人から言われたら」
languages.original_text: "Unsettling words. Especially coming from someone with your... specialism."

traits.locale_text: 「不安にさせるような言葉ですね。特に、あなたのような…専門分野を持つ人から言われたら。」

languages.text: « Des propos troublants, surtout venant d'une personne dans votre... domaine de spécialisation. »
languages.original_text: "Unsettling words. Especially coming from someone with your... specialism."

traits.locale_text: « Des propos troublants, surtout venant d'une personne dans votre... domaine de spécialisation. »

languages.text: "Beunruhigende Worte. Vor allem von jemandem mit Eurem ... Fachgebiet."
languages.original_text: "Unsettling words. Especially coming from someone with your... specialism."

traits.locale_text: "Beunruhigende Worte. Vor allem von jemandem mit Eurem ... Fachgebiet."

languages.text: "Rahatsız edici sözler. Özellikle de senin... Uzmanlık alanına sahip birinden gelince."
languages.original_text: "Unsettling words. Especially coming from someone with your... specialism."

traits.locale_text: "Rahatsız edici sözler. Özellikle de senin... Uzmanlık alanına sahip birinden gelince."

languages.text: «Una afirmación preocupante. Sobre todo viniendo de alguien con su... especialidad».
languages.original_text: "Unsettling words. Especially coming from someone with your... specialism."

traits.locale_text: «Una afirmación preocupante. Sobre todo viniendo de alguien con su... especialidad».

languages.text: “这话真是令人不安，尤其是出自您这种……专业人士之口。”
languages.original_text: "Unsettling words. Especially coming from someone with your... specialism."

traits.locale_text: “这话真是令人不安，尤其是出自您这种……专业人士之口。”
